title: gouania lupuloides
intro: Gouania lupuloides, also known as the Guanabani or Wild Guava, is a tropical plant species native to the Caribbean region and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gouania lupuloides include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Gouania lupuloides can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, with the tea being a popular herbal preparation for its medicinal properties.
